headline: Charles Schwab (SCHW) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift After Investor Day Revisions
summary: The latest analyst work on Charles Schwab includes refreshed price target models that incorporate a slightly higher fair value estimate of US$116.16, compared with the prior US$115.85. These adjustments reflect how bullish and bearish analysts are digesting Schwab’s investor day messaging, particularly around revenue, expense, and earnings frameworks, as well as the role of AI and client cash behavior in their scenarios. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifts and what to watch...
